sections.paragraph:
σελήνη, ης, ἡ (Hom.+) moon PtK 2 p. 14, 27 (twice). W. sun and stars (X., Mem. 4, 3, 4; SIG 1267, 18f; Jo 2:10; 4:15; EpJer 59; TestNapht 3:2; Ar. 3, 2; Just., D. 85, 5; Ath. 6, 3) Lk 21:25; 1 Cor 15:41; Rv 6:12f; 8:12; 1 Cl 20:3; B 15:5; Dg 7:2; IEph 19:2. W. the sun (Maximus Tyr. 40, 4h; oft. in LXX) Rv 12:1; 21:23; 2 Cl 14:1 (cp. ἥλιος, end). W. the stars (Ps 8:4) Dg 4:5. Darkened in the time of tribulation (s. Is 13:10; Ezk 32:7; Jo 2:10; 4:15) Mt 24:29; Mk 13:24; changed to blood Ac 2:20 (Jo 3:4); cp. Rv 6:12.—WGrafBaudissin, RE XIII 337–49; ORühle, RGG IV 1930, 161–67 (lit.); Kl. Pauly III 1194–96; 1408f; RE XIII 337–49; BHHW II 1235f; RGG3 IV 1094–97; 1098–1113 (lit.).—B. 55. M-M. Sv.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

PtK PtK = Petruskerygma (Preaching of Peter)—List 1

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

TestNapht TestNapht = Testament of Naphthali, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Ar. Ar. = Aristides, apologist, II a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

Dg Dg = Letter of Diognetus, attributed to an unidentifiable apologist; II a.d.—List 1

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

Maximus Maximus Tyr , II a.d.—List 5

oft. oft. = often

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

RE RE = Realencyclopädie für protestantische Theologie und Kirche—List 6

RGG RGG = Die Religion in Geschichte und Gegenwart—List 6

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 918
